---
title: "Location"
---

# Location

Gefeiert wird im Kranwerk Naunhof.

<iframe 
  src="https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m18!1m12!1m3!1d3051.3754860513895!2d12.5939651!3d51.2799559!2m3!1f0!2f0!3f0!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!3m3!1m2!1s0x47a701c28a4acfd3%3A0xf9518f73c7721523!2sAltes%20Kranwerk%20Naunhof!5e1!3m2!1sde!2sde!4v1772829529337!5m2!1sde!2sde" 
  width="600" 
  height="450" 
  style="border:0;" 
  allowfullscreen="" 
  loading="lazy">
</iframe>


<iframe width="425" height="350" src="https://www.openstreetmap.org/export/embed.html?bbox=12.592823803424837%2C51.279219487910325%2C12.593716979026794%2C51.28070263084513&amp;layer=mapnik" style="border: 1px solid black"></iframe><br/><small><a href="https://www.openstreetmap.org/?#map=19/51.279961/12.593270">View Larger Map</a></small>


## Location

The celebration takes place here:

<iframe 
    width="100%" 
    height="450" 
    frameborder="0" 
    scrolling="no" 
    marginheight="0" 
    marginwidth="0"
    src="https://www.openstreetmap.org/export/embed.html?bbox=12.589470417113893%2C51.27505271434776%2C12.599470417113893%2C51.28505271434776&amp;layer=mapnik&amp;marker=51.28005271434776%2C12.594470417113893">
</iframe>

<br/>
<small>
  <a href="https://www.openstreetmap.org/?mlat=51.280053&amp;mlon=12.594470#map=15/51.28005271434776/12.594470417113893" target="_blank">
    View Larger Map
  </a>
</small>
